sales.description:
GREEK WORLD
Egypt
Ptolemy II Philadelphos, 285 – 246 BC.
Trichryson or Pentadrachm circa 274 BC, Tyre. Diademed head of Ptolemy I right, wearing aegis around neck, dotted border / Eagle with closed wings, standing left on thunderbolt, H in left field, above club, dotted border. 17,80g. 21mm. BMC 74; CPE 555; Svoronos 636; Weber 8256.
NGC Ch AU 5/5 3/5 Light mark.
(6645988-001).
Good extremely fine.

Provenance: Leu 2 (25 April 1972), 304.
